title: festuca brevis
intro: Festuca brevis, also known as dwarf fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, Festuca brevis has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Festuca brevis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential interactions.
